creator: dburr@borg-cube.com
text:
Attempted to build the socks5 port.  Followed the directions on how to
download the file from NEC.  But the file I get has  a different MD5
checksum than the port wants, nevertheless the port works fine with this
new file.  My guess is that they recompressed it or something... *shrug*

How-To-Repeat: 
Try downloading socks5 from NEC.
